data.body:
## TDD: Tests from Task 3223-3034 must fail (RED) before this task, pass (GREEN) after

Create plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh PoC script.

## Implementation
- Download ACLI binary from acli.atlassian.com/{platform}/latest/acli_{platform}_{arch}
- Run acli --version and parse version string (handle -stable suffix)
- Construct versioned tarball URL: https://acli.atlassian.com/{platform}/{version}/acli_{version}_{platform}_{arch}.tar.gz
- Download versioned tarball to temp dir
- Compute SHA256 of downloaded tarball
- Output: ACLI_VERSION={version} and ACLI_SHA256={hash} (one per line)
- Exit 0 on success, non-zero with descriptive error on failure
- Support --platform and --arch flags (default: detect from uname)

## Documentation Requirements (in script header)
- Version string format with concrete example (e.g., "1.3.5-stable")
- Versioned tarball URL pattern with example
- Supported platform/arch values
- Expected output format
- Manual validation results for 2+ versions (e.g., # Validated: v1.3.4-stable SHA256=..., v1.3.5-stable SHA256=...)

## .test-index
Remove RED marker from .test-index entry after tests pass.
Rollback note: If this task is reverted, restore the RED marker to prevent test gate failures.

## Files
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh
- EDIT: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh
- [ ] Script handles missing arguments gracefully (non-zero exit)
  Verify: { $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] Script header documents version string format with example
  Verify: grep -q 'version.*format\|Version.*format' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh
- [ ] Script header documents URL pattern
  Verify: grep -q 'acli.atlassian.com' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh
- [ ] Manual validation results recorded in header for 2+ versions
  Verify: grep -c 'Validated:' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/acli-version-resolver.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: { grep 'acli-version-resolver.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -v '\['; test $? -eq 0; }
